# Design craft — composition defaults (DS-agnostic)

This fixture file simulates the craft/regenerated-not-copied failure mode: an
agent "helpfully" regenerated the shipped design-craft reference during Phase 3
instead of letting scaffold.sh copy it byte-for-byte. The content below is a
paraphrased, trimmed variant — close enough to look right, drifted enough to
have lost rules.

## Layout

- Try to pick an interesting page structure when it makes sense.
- Cards inside cards are usually best avoided.

## Color

- Prefer DS tokens for colors where convenient.
